heading: Supplies and equipment from stock
label: 940 Supplies and equipment from stock
text: Supplies and equipment for special work of the Coast Guard may be furnished from general stock and the applicable appropriation reimbursed therefor from the respective appropriations for such special work.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 33, U.S.C., 1934 ed., § 726 (, ).Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 16837 Stat. 1018Changes were made in phraseology. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 649 of this title
